introSection: Tron Lightcycle Power Run (Chinese: 创极速光轮, formatted as TRON Lightcycle Power Run) is a steel launched motorbike roller coaster at Shanghai Disneyland. The ride allows riders to go on their own Lightcycle train. The ride is commonly seen as Shanghai Disneyland's replacement of Space Mountain.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride opened with the park on 16 June 2016.

In July 2017, it was announced that the Magic Kingdom would be building a clone of the ride. It opened on 4 April 2023, as part of Walt Disney World's 50th anniversary.

On 30 August 2025, Disney announced starting 16 September that the ride would have a temporary overlay in conjunction with the upcoming movie TRON: Ares. The overlay would include red lighting and sounds from the film's soundtrack.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 7 trains with 7 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 14 riders per train.

fullText:
Tron Lightcycle Power Run (Chinese: 创极速光轮, formatted as TRON Lightcycle Power Run) is a steel launched motorbike roller coaster at Shanghai Disneyland. The ride allows riders to go on their own Lightcycle train. The ride is commonly seen as Shanghai Disneyland's replacement of Space Mountain.

The ride opened with the park on 16 June 2016.

In July 2017, it was announced that the Magic Kingdom would be building a clone of the ride. It opened on 4 April 2023, as part of Walt Disney World's 50th anniversary.

On 30 August 2025, Disney announced starting 16 September that the ride would have a temporary overlay in conjunction with the upcoming movie TRON: Ares. The overlay would include red lighting and sounds from the film's soundtrack.



7 trains with 7 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 14 riders per train.
